title: Dekluun
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=CIS |image=[[File:Dekluun.jpg]] |name=Dekluun |homeworld=[[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]]''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] |species=[[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|White]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin=Pink |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|How long until we're ready to move out?''"
"''About six hours, Sir. We can strike at dusk——with the sun at our backs.''"
"''Good. The clones have us overmatched and outgunned——we need to employ every advantage we have.|Dekluun and his aide|}} '''Dekluun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who led [[Troop/Legends|troops]] when the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] was [[Battle of Thustra|invaded]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] after the Sephi had seceded from the Republic in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. While deploying his [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] to prepare for an attack on the Republic [[unit]]s, Dekluun was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the enemy launched a surprise strike. ==Biography== {{Quote|Commander Dekluun! Something's coming!''"
"''… No!|A soldier and Dekluun, seconds before their deaths|}} Dekluun was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] who lived during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. the Sephi under their [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] decided to secede from the Republic and join the Confederacy, an action that resulted in a Republic task force being sent to Thustra in order to make a show of force. Holding the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]], Dekluun led [[Troop/Legends|troops]] in the [[Battle of Thustra|ensuing battle]], in which the first attacks by the Sephi inflicted heavy casualties on the Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. Dekluun than began to deploy his [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] just out of range of the Republic forces, preparing to attack the enemy and drive them from Thustra. However, the Sephi [[Senator/Legends|Senator]], [[Navi]], betrayed both his own people and the Republic in a power gamble and gave the Republic forces the coordinates of the Dekluun's forces as well as the location of a hidden pass that could be used to surprise the Sephi. While still preparing the troops for his own attack, Dekluun and his [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] were caught off-guard by the Republic. [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] opened [[Laser/Legends|fire]] on the Sephi positions, [[Death/Legends|killing]] Dekluun in the first [[Standard second|seconds]] of the assault. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|We know every rock and blade of grass out here——every hiding sport and attack point. We're fighting for our land and for our families. They're the ones at a disadvantage, Sir.''"
"''Hold onto that——|The aide and Dekluun|}} Dekluun was an able military commander and realized that for a victory over the superior weapons and numbers of the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] army he would have to employ every possible advantage. Despite this, the attack of the Republic forces caught him completely by surprise and led to his death. When [[Dekluun's aide|his aide]] pointed out that the Sephi were the ones with an advantage as they fought to protect their families and their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], he was happy about his subordinate's attitude. Dekluun had [[Color/Legends|white]] hair, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and pink skin. ==Armor and equipment== During the battle of Thustra, the commander wore whole-body [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. ==Behind the scenes== Dekluun first appeared in the ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[Jeremy Barlow]] and illustrated by [[HOON]]. ''Jedi: Yoda'' was released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] and published in [[2004]]. The commander later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ([[2008]]). ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dekluun#legends |pl=Dekluun |pt=Dekluun }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Separatist officers]] [[Category:Sephi]]
